title: rosa carolina var. lyonii
intro: Rosa carolina var. lyonii, also known as the Lyon's rose, is a variant of the Carolina rose, a shrub native to the southeastern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa carolina var. lyonii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Rosa carolina var. lyonii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
